text.style: font-size: 26px; font-family: "Caveat Brush"; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Key datasets for MBA research

text.style: font-size: 33px; font-family: Pacifico; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Dataset Use Cases for MBA Research

text.style: font-size: 23px; font-family: Raleway; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Market research data includes consumer surveys,
sales data, and competitor analysis. This data is
crucial for understanding market trends, consumer
behavior, and competitive landscape, which helps
MBA students develop marketing strategies and
business plans.

text.style: font-size: 36px; font-family: "Amatic SC"; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
font-size: 56px; font-family: "Cartoon Marker"; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
font-size: 23px; font-family: Raleway; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Financial data encompasses balance sheets,
income statements, and cash flow reports. MBA
students use this data to perform financial analysis,
investment assessment, and risk management,
gaining insights into a company’s financial health
and future performance predictions.

text.style: font-size: 36px; font-family: "Amatic SC"; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;
font-size: 56px; font-family: "Cartoon Marker"; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;
font-size: 23px; font-family: Raleway; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Operational data involves production metrics,
supply chain statistics, and inventory levels. MBA
students analyze this data to streamline operations,
improve efficiency, and support the development of
sustainable business practices.

text.style: font-size: 36px; font-family: "Amatic SC"; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;
font-size: 47px; font-family: "Cartoon Marker"; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;
font-size: 23px; font-family: Raleway; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Economic indicators include GDP, unemployment
rates, and inflation statistics. These datasets help
MBA students understand the macroeconomic
environment, guide strategic planning, and assess
the impact of economic policies on business
operations and performance.

text.style: font-size: 36px; font-family: "Amatic SC"; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
font-size: 56px; font-family: "Cartoon Marker"; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
font-size: 23px; font-family: Raleway; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Customer feedback data comes from reviews,
satisfaction surveys, and social media comments. It
allows MBA students to gauge customer satisfaction,
identify areas for improvement, and innovate
products or services to better meet consumer
needs.

text.style: font-size: 22px; font-family: "Amatic SC"; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
font-size: 53px; font-family: "Cartoon Marker"; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;
font-size: 21px; font-family: Raleway; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Financial Data

text.style: font-size: 21px; font-family: Raleway; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Market Research Data

text.style: font-size: 21px; font-family: Raleway; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Economic Indicators

text.style: font-size: 21px; font-family: Raleway; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Operational Data

text.style: font-size: 21px; font-family: Raleway; fill: rgb(17, 17, 17); opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;
text.tspan: Customer Feedback
